calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-29-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue Kaplan; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Sara Lerschen. Petitioner, Patricia Recio appeared in pro per. Proof of service of mailing to minor's father in Ohio. The court hears evidence and grants the decree changing names of the minors to: 1) E'Lexis-Aledandra Rodrigues and 2) Eduardo Cuito Rodriguez. Decree signed in open court.
